title: cyperus kyllingia f. humilis
intro: Cyperus kyllingia f. humilis, also known as Dwarf Cyperus or Small Flowered Flat Sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cyperus kyllingia f. humilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
